name: Nil map write panic in WorkerPool
description: WorkerPool declares 'var results map[int]Result' which initialises results to nil. The loop immediately attempts results[id] = Result{...}, which panics at runtime with 'assignment to entry in nil map'.

expected_findings.description: WorkerPool uses 'var results map[int]Result' which is nil. Writing to a nil map causes a runtime panic. The fix is 'results := make(map[int]Result)' to initialise the map before use.

expected_clean.description: Server entry point with no map operations
